steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The goal is to “describe the FORMAT” of the poem. Format means structural composition. The notes contain one format detail: “The poem is written as a sequence of seven haiku.”

steps.title: Match the format description to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D directly states the format of this poem: a sequence of seven haiku.

Choices A and B provide information unrelated to format (motivation and publication context), while C overgeneralizes to all poems in the book and omits the specific number.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
